name: Medallion Metals Limited.
analysis: MM8 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.4450, stop A$0.3688, target A$0.5000 (0.72:1) — then trail it.
